wins: Strong growth in multiple myeloma portfolio with DARZALEX up 21%
CARVYKTI sales up 100% YoY with FDA approval for second-line setting
TECVAYLI sales up to $133 million with strong launch in relapsed refractory setting
Positive top line results from FRONTIER 2 study for JNJ-2113 in psoriasis
FDA approval for RYBREVANT in combination with chemotherapy for non-small cell lung cancer
risks: Unfavorable patient mix in XARELTO expected to continue throughout the year
Potential disruption in pulmonary hypertension market with Merck's WINREVAIR
TALVEY's impact on TECVAYLI growth remains a concern
Uncertainty around the impact of currency movements on reported sales growth
